/chat_channel_types/ironcow.m: 不过你大概还是需要什么都高，远程、魔法等等。是集中练一个到某个程度更好？而不是平均升级它们？
/chat_channel_types/ironcow.o: you kinda need high everything though anyway I guess, range, magic etc. is it better to focus on one to a certain point? rather than leveling them equally?

/chat_channel_types/ironcow.m: @JBIC 你可以主玩壁垒，只是它在副本中达到巅峰，之后完全乏力
/chat_channel_types/ironcow.o: @JBIC you can main bulwark, it's just that it peaks at dungeons and falls off completely later

/chat_channel_types/ironcow.m: 你只需要一个高的，除非你想要总等级，否则没必要练每个战斗技能
/chat_channel_types/ironcow.o: you only need 1 high, there's no point levelling every combat unless you want total levels

/chat_channel_types/ironcow.m: 等你以后做实验室的时候，得把它们升到85级左右，因为你那里什么都需要
/chat_channel_types/ironcow.o: later on when you're doing lab you'll have to level them up to 85 or so since you need everything there

/chat_channel_types/ironcow.m: @ironfeal明白了，我还以为你需要它们全部用于某些农场等（法师的范围等），谢谢！
/chat_channel_types/ironcow.o: @ironfeal gotchya, I thought you needed them all for certain farms etc (range for sorc etc) I appreciate it, thank you!

/chat_channel_types/ironcow.m: 大部分情况下，如果你专注于一种战斗风格，你会更强，主要例外是近战训练远程到85级以穿戴狮鹫，在获得锚之前做术士/深渊
/chat_channel_types/ironcow.o: for the most part you will be stronger if you focus 1 combat style, main exception is melee training range to 85 to wear griffin to do sorc/abyss before getting anchor

/chat_channel_types/ironcow.m: 你可以选择一把95级君主剑，这将弥补常规行星突击中伤害输出的不足。
/chat_channel_types/ironcow.o: You may select a Level 95 Monarch Sword, which will make up for insufficient damage output during regular planetary assaults.
